name: TestGetWaitEventMostAMSMsgData
title: TestGetWaitEventMostAMSMsgData
syntax: long TestGetWaitEventMostAMSMsgData (dword index, MostAMSmessage aMessage); // form 2
description: If the last event was a MOST AMS message that resolved a wait construction, with the first function the content of the message can be called.The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin…") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: Message variable that should be filled in with this function.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Number of the "joined event" corresponds with the return value of "testJoin...".

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
